prompt: Order these writing technology milestones from earliest to latest

events.title: Cuneiform in Sumer
events.fact: 3200 BC — oldest known writing system on clay tablets

events.title: Egyptian Hieroglyphs
events.fact: 3000 BC — pictographic writing system on papyrus/stone

events.title: Paper invented in China
events.fact: 105 BC — Cai Lun invents modern papermaking process

events.title: Gutenberg printing press
events.fact: 1440 — movable metal type system introduced to Europe

events.title: Laser printer invented
events.fact: 1969 — Gary Starkweather adapts xerography at Xerox

events.title: E-book invented
events.fact: 1971 — Michael S. Hart digitizes US Declaration for Project Gutenberg
